company_description: Trellix is a cybersecurity company offering an AI-powered, open security platform covering endpoint, data, network, email, and cloud security with integrated threat detection and response capabilities.

products.name: Trellix Endpoint Security
products.description: Unified endpoint agent providing attack surface reduction, protection, detection, forensics, and remediation across hybrid environments.

products.name: Trellix EDR with Forensics
products.description: Endpoint detection and response solution with integrated forensics capabilities for investigating and responding to threats.

products.name: Trellix ePolicy Orchestrator (ePO)
products.description: Centralized security management platform for policy orchestration, monitoring, and administration of Trellix security products.

products.name: Trellix Network Security
products.description: Network detection and response solution that eliminates security blind spots by analyzing network traffic for threats.

products.name: Trellix Data Loss Prevention
products.description: DLP solution that monitors and controls data movement to prevent unauthorized exfiltration of sensitive information.

products.name: Trellix Security Platform
products.description: Comprehensive AI-powered open security platform integrating endpoint, email, network, data, cloud, and security operations into a single console.

products.name: Trellix Wise
products.description: Purpose-built generative and predictive AI engine powering detections, guided investigations, summarization, and threat landscape contextualization across the Trellix platform.

products.name: Trellix Intrusion Prevention System
products.description: IPS solution that detects and blocks network-based intrusion attempts and malicious traffic in real time.

products.name: Trellix Email Security
products.description: Email security solution protecting organizations from phishing, malware, and advanced email-borne threats.

products.name: Trellix Threat Intelligence Exchange
products.description: Platform that enables real-time sharing of threat intelligence across security products and third-party tools to accelerate threat detection.

products.name: Trellix Data Encryption
products.description: Encryption solution protecting data at rest and in transit across endpoints and storage environments.

products.name: Trellix Network Forensics
products.description: Network forensics tool that captures and analyzes network traffic to support incident investigation and threat hunting.

products.name: Trellix Endpoint Forensics
products.description: Endpoint forensics capability providing deep investigation and evidence collection for incident response on compromised endpoints.

products.name: Trellix Application and Change Control
products.description: Application whitelisting and change control solution that prevents unauthorized applications and system changes on endpoints.

products.name: Trellix Database Security
products.description: Database activity monitoring and protection solution that detects unauthorized access and anomalous database behavior.

products.name: Trellix Global Threat Intelligence
products.description: Cloud-based threat intelligence service providing real-time reputation data on files, URLs, IPs, and domains from a global sensor network.

products.name: Trellix Insights
products.description: Threat intelligence portal providing mission-critical insights and contextual analysis of the evolving threat landscape.

products.name: Trellix Mobile Security
products.description: Mobile threat defense solution protecting iOS and Android devices from malware, phishing, and network-based attacks.

products.name: Trellix Advanced Threat Landscape Analysis System
products.description: Advanced threat analysis system providing deep visibility into the threat landscape for proactive defense planning.

products.name: Trellix SecondSight
products.description: Security posture and risk visibility tool that provides actionable insights into an organization's security health and exposure.

products.name: Trellix Private Global Threat Intelligence
products.description: On-premises deployment of Trellix's global threat intelligence service for air-gapped or high-security environments.

products.name: Trellix Intelligence as a Service
products.description: Managed threat intelligence service delivering curated, actionable intelligence feeds and analysis to security teams.

products.name: Trellix Education Services
products.description: Trellix's official training program offering instructor-led, eLearning, and hands-on lab courses for Trellix product configuration, management, and cybersecurity best practices.

competitive_products.competitive_context: CrowdStrike Falcon competes directly with Trellix Endpoint Security and EDR as a leading cloud-native endpoint protection and detection platform.
Cortex XDR competes with Trellix's EDR and Security Platform by offering extended detection and response across endpoint, network, and cloud.
Microsoft Defender for Endpoint competes with Trellix Endpoint Security as a widely deployed endpoint protection and EDR solution.
Symantec Endpoint Security competes with Trellix Endpoint Security in the enterprise endpoint protection market.
Proofpoint Email Protection competes with Trellix Email Security for enterprise email threat defense.
Forcepoint DLP competes with Trellix Data Loss Prevention for enterprise data protection and insider threat management.
Cisco Secure Network Analytics competes with Trellix Network Security and NDR for network visibility and threat detection.
SentinelOne Singularity competes with Trellix's endpoint and XDR offerings as an AI-powered autonomous security platform.
Recorded Future competes with Trellix Insights and Threat Intelligence Exchange for enterprise threat intelligence services.

page_contents.training_page: Education Services | Trellix Take a Product Tour Request a Demo Cybersecurity Assessment Contact Us Education Services A broad training portfolio maximizes the benefit and ROI from your solutions. Product Training To gain maximum value from your solutions, you need expertly trained staff to configure and manage your solutions more efficiently, and optimally safeguard your critical data. You also need your staff on-site, doing their job. Now you can have both. We offer a wide range of hands-on product training courses to help you design, set up, configure, and manage your solutions. Our courses help you make the most of your product investment. Browse our public instructor-led courses for scheduled offerings. Browse our selection of eLearning courses, available online at any time. To schedule a private course for your organization or to inquire about a custom course, please contact us . Explore and Register for Training Security Training Get comprehensive and focused in-person classroom training. Held in private classes at your location, our fully immersive training is led by our experienced security instructors and gives you the opportunity to build best practices for implementing a cybersecurity strategy. Gain the skills you need to proactively defend against the latest security threats. Our comprehensive security training from top industry experts helps your IT professionals gain proficiency in best practices to implement your security strategy and better respond to incidents. Our security courses provide training to help security professionals build secure software and applications, assess vulnerabilities to defend against hacker attacks, and gain critical computer forensics skills to better respond to incidents. Taught by network security experts, our security training features interactive demonstrations and hands-on lab exercises. These instructor-led courses are offered in private classrooms only. To schedule please contact us . Courses IT Risk Strategy - Measure and Treat IT Risk Across Your Enterprise. Application Security Training - Courses include: Attacking Web Applications, Attacking Android and iOS, Building Secure Software, Writing Secure Code: Java. Infrastructure Security Training - Courses include: Beginning Assessment & Penetration Testing, Advanced Assessment and Penetration Testing, Attacking Wireless Technologies, Attacking Firmware, Industrial Control Security, Attacking ICS and IoT. Forensics and Incident Response - Courses include:

page_contents.partner_portal_page:
Partners | Trellix Take a Product Tour Request a Demo Cybersecurity Assessment Contact Us Trellix Partners Explore our NEW Xtend Global Partner Program Become a Partner Trellix Partner Portal Xtend Partner Program Our partnership advances your security business with a new approach to security that is fast enough to keep up with dynamic threats and intelligent enough to learn from them. Partnering with Trellix extends your customer relationships by developing trust, applying security expertise, and customizing your security offerings to defend against the biggest cyber threats. Trellix Partner Portal Login OEM & Embedded Alliance Build security directly into your products Deliver robust protection, by embedding into Trellix solutions, to serve customers with the unique advantage of purpose-built security directly into your products. Learn More Partner Delivered Services Best-in-class security services Get the help you need whether it is deploying solutions, hardening your defenses, managing your environment, or transforming your business. Learn More Become a Partner Partner with Trellix to deliver best-in-class, optimized security solutions to your customers. Trellix partners have the inside track on trending security issues, technologies, and products. Become a Partner Security Advisors Provide security expertise delivered through a sophisticated range of efficient cybersecurity services to ensure customers can rise to any security challenge and become cyber-resilient while mitigating risk. Marketplace Partners Deliver emerging, digitally scalable buying motions based on simplicity, flexibility, and minimum time to value. Technology Alliance Program The Technology Alliance Program (TAP) brings together innovative technology partners to deliver scalable, seamless integrations with the Trellix AI-powered security platform. Guided by a customer-first approach, we focus on extending protection, simplifying complex environments, and driving measurable impact where it matters most. Ready to build with Trellix?
